mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTHDATE, GENDER, ADDR_SIDO, ADDR_SIGUNGU, RESIDE_AREA_CODE, RESIDE_SIGUNGU_CODE, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, SOCIAL_PROVIDER, EXP_POINT, TITLE_ID, CREATED_AT, SOCIAL_ID FROM MEMBER WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{member_id}

SELECT MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTHDATE, GENDER, ADDR_SIDO, ADDR_SIGUNGU, RESIDE_AREA_CODE, RESIDE_SIGUNGU_CODE, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, SOCIAL_PROVIDER, EXP_POINT, TITLE_ID, CREATED_AT, SOCIAL_ID FROM MEMBER WHERE SOCIAL_ID = #{socialId} AND SOCIAL_PROVIDER = #{socialProvider}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBER ( MEMBER_ID, PASSWORD, NAME, NICKNAME, PHONE, EMAIL, BIRTHDATE, GENDER, ADDR_SIDO, ADDR_SIGUNGU, RESIDE_AREA_CODE, RESIDE_SIGUNGU_CODE, PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, SOCIAL_PROVIDER, EXP_POINT, TITLE_ID, CREATED_AT, SOCIAL_ID ) VALUES ( 'kakao_' || MEMBER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{password}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{birthdate}, #{gender}, #{addr_sido}, #{addr_sigungu}, #{reside_area_code}, #{reside_sigungu_code}, #{profile_image_url}, #{social_provider}, #{exp_point}, #{title_id}, SYSDATE, #{social_id} )
